belier.intro: The Moon has moved into Gemini at 3 degrees today, entering your third house as the waning crescent phase begins at 34 percent illumination, bringing lighter, more curious energy after two days of material focus. The Leo Sun advances to 14 degrees in your fifth house, keeping creative confidence warm even as your mind turns toward conversation and quick exchanges of ideas.
belier.love: Words matter more than gestures today. A light, honest text or conversation can do more for a relationship than a grand plan.
belier.work: Short-term communication tasks, emails, calls, quick decisions, flow easily today. Save the bigger strategic thinking for another day.
belier.energy: Your fire turns quick and mental today rather than physical. Restlessness is best channeled into varied, short tasks.
belier.intuition: A fleeting thought or overheard comment may carry more meaning than it first appears. Pay attention to what catches your ear today.
belier.mantra: I speak my truth simply and let it land where it will.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your second house today, shifting focus from self-knowledge toward material matters as the waning crescent phase begins its quiet decline. The Leo Sun in your fourth house continues to warm home and family themes, creating a gentle backdrop to today's more practical concerns.
taureau.love: Practical support, covering a cost, helping with a task, speaks louder than words in a relationship today.
taureau.work: A financial or resource-related conversation benefits from Gemini's lighter touch today. Keep it factual and brief.
taureau.energy: Your usual steadiness takes on a slightly quicker, more mentally engaged quality today.
taureau.intuition: A passing thought about money or value deserves a second look rather than immediate dismissal.
taureau.mantra: I value clear, simple truths about what matters to me.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today at 3 degrees Gemini, and the waning crescent phase brings a lighter, more personal energy right where you feel most natural. The Leo Sun in your third house doubles your usual quickness and curiosity, making this a day for genuine self-expression rather than performance for others.
gemeaux.love: Say what you actually think today. Your directness, delivered with warmth, is more attractive than careful diplomacy.
gemeaux.work: Your communication skills are especially sharp today. Use them for something that matters to you personally, not just professionally.
gemeaux.energy: Quick and bright, your energy today favors variety over repetition. Move between tasks freely.
gemeaux.intuition: Your first instinct about a person or situation is unusually reliable today. Trust the quick read.
gemeaux.mantra: I trust my quick mind and speak my truth freely.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your twelfth house today, pulling energy inward even as the waning crescent phase continues its gentle decline. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps questions of security present, but today favors quiet reflection over decisive action on those questions.
cancer.love: An unspoken feeling deserves private reflection today rather than immediate expression. Let it clarify first.
cancer.work: Quiet, behind-the-scenes tasks suit you better than visible ones today. Trust that rest is part of the process.
cancer.energy: Withdrawal is appropriate today. Do not mistake it for avoidance; it is genuine restoration.
cancer.intuition: A dream or a passing mental image tonight may carry insight worth remembering. Keep pen and paper close.
cancer.mantra: I trust the quiet knowing that comes in stillness.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees fills your eleventh house today, bringing sociable, idea-sharing energy as the waning crescent phase settles into a more contemplative mood. The Sun remains in your own sign, keeping your natural warmth steady even as attention shifts toward friendships and future plans.
lion.love: A friend's perspective on your relationship may offer useful, if unexpected, insight today.
lion.work: Networking and idea-sharing serve you well today, more so than solitary effort. Reach out to a collaborator.
lion.energy: Social and mentally engaged, your energy favors conversation over solitary focus today.
lion.intuition: Your read on a group's true direction is sharp today. Trust what you sense beneath the surface talk.
lion.mantra: I share my ideas freely with those who truly listen.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your tenth house today, bringing quick, communicative energy to career matters as the waning crescent phase asks for lighter engagement than the recent intensity. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house keeps private reflection present even as public matters demand attention.
vierge.love: A partner's understanding of your professional pressures matters today. A brief, honest update keeps things easy between you.
vierge.work: Communication about your professional direction, a quick update, a clarifying email, serves you better than a major move today.
vierge.energy: Quick and mentally engaged, your energy favors short, focused bursts of professional activity today.
vierge.intuition: A passing thought about your career direction deserves a second look rather than immediate dismissal.
vierge.mantra: I communicate my direction with clarity and ease.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your ninth house today, bringing a lighter, more curious energy to questions of belief and long-range vision as the waning crescent phase settles in. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendships supportive and present in the background.
balance.love: A conversation about differing perspectives with a partner can be genuinely enjoyable today rather than tense.
balance.work: New ideas about your long-term direction are worth exploring today, even briefly, before committing to any one path.
balance.energy: Curious and light, your energy favors learning something new today rather than executing an established plan.
balance.intuition: An idea that seems only mildly interesting today may prove more significant with time. Note it down.
balance.mantra: I stay curious about what I have not yet considered.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your eighth house today, bringing a quicker, more communicative quality to matters of trust and shared resources as the waning crescent phase eases recent intensity. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps career visibility present in the background.
scorpion.love: A light but honest conversation about trust can accomplish more today than a heavy, serious one.
scorpion.work: A financial or contractual matter benefits from clear, brief communication today rather than prolonged negotiation.
scorpion.energy: Mentally quick rather than emotionally heavy, your energy favors direct conversation today.
scorpion.intuition: A brief exchange may reveal more about someone's true intentions than a longer conversation would. Listen closely.
scorpion.mantra: I say what is true, simply and without excess weight.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees fills your seventh house today, casting a light, communicative quality onto your closest partnerships as the waning crescent phase settles in. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps your appetite for exploration alive, adding a sense of possibility to relationship conversations.
sagittaire.love: A light-hearted, curious conversation with a partner today can open a door that heavier discussions have kept closed.
sagittaire.work: Negotiations benefit from a flexible, communicative approach today rather than rigid positioning.
sagittaire.energy: Sociable and quick, your energy favors engaging directly with others today rather than working alone.
sagittaire.intuition: Your read on a partner's unspoken needs is sharp today, if you listen for what is not being said.
sagittaire.mantra: I stay open and curious in my closest relationships.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your sixth house today, bringing quick, communicative energy to routine and daily responsibilities as the waning crescent phase settles in. The Leo Sun in your eighth house adds depth to conversations that might otherwise stay on the surface.
capricorne.love: A brief, honest exchange about daily rhythms serves a relationship well today. Keep it light but truthful.
capricorne.work: Quick adjustments to your daily routine or workflow are favored today. Do not overthink small improvements.
capricorne.energy: Mentally engaged rather than physically driven, your energy favors variety in your daily tasks today.
capricorne.intuition: A small, practical insight about your routine deserves immediate action rather than delay.
capricorne.mantra: I make small, honest adjustments that truly help.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees fills your fifth house today, bringing playful, communicative energy to creativity and romance as the waning crescent phase settles in. Saturn retrograde continues its work in your own sign, while the Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key relationship warmly present.
verseau.love: Playful conversation, rather than serious discussion, deepens a relationship today. Let lightness do the work.
verseau.work: A creative idea benefits from being talked through with someone else today rather than developed alone.
verseau.energy: Light and quick, your energy favors playful engagement over structured effort today.
verseau.intuition: An offhand creative idea deserves more attention than its casual origin suggests.
verseau.mantra: I let lightness and curiosity guide my creativity.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 3 degrees moves into your fourth house today, bringing quick, communicative energy to home and family matters as the waning crescent phase settles in. The Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps daily routines in focus, grounding your usual sensitivity in practical concerns.
poissons.love: A light conversation at home today can clear up a small misunderstanding before it grows larger.
poissons.work: Balancing home matters with daily responsibilities is easier today with a bit of clear, brief communication.
poissons.energy: Mentally active rather than emotionally heavy, your energy favors light domestic tasks today.
poissons.intuition: A small thought about your home life deserves a moment of honest attention today.
poissons.mantra: I keep home conversations light, honest, and clear.
poissons.author: Sibylle
